templates.title: Linux Server Monitoring
templates.description: A pre-configured Linux monitoring solution using Docker.

env.name: SMARTCTL_INTERVAL
env.label: How often to poll devices for SMART status

env.name: PROMETHEUS_RETENTION_TIME
env.label: How long to store metrics data in Prometheus

env.name: PROMETHEUS_RETENTION_SIZE
env.label: Largest size to allow the TSDB file to grow before trimming

env.name: PROMETHEUS_ENABLE_REMOTE_WRITES
env.label: Enable API endpoint accepting remote write requests

env.name: GRAFANA_WEB_PORT
env.label: Port on the host (server) that will be mapped to the Grafana website

templates.note:
Application data MUST be set up BEFORE deploying this stack using the following: 

wget -qO- https://thedebuggedlife.github.io/portainer-templates/appdata/linux-monitoring.sh | bash

See the template README or the related blog post for more info.

templates.title: Linux Server Monitoring (Agent)
templates.description: Collects server metrics and sends them to a central Prometheus aggregation service.

env.name: SMARTCTL_INTERVAL
env.label: How often to poll devices for SMART status

templates.note:
Application data MUST be set up BEFORE deploying this stack using the following: 

wget -qO- https://thedebuggedlife.github.io/portainer-templates/appdata/linux-monitoring-agent.sh | bash

See the template README
